summary: Journey Board Alerts are now live — follow cards, get daily digests, and navigate directly to filtered patient lists. A few enhancements to Patient Tracking and Patient Profile.

updates.title: Journey Board Alerts & Daily Digest
updates.body: Follow the journey board cards that matter to you and receive a daily email showing how many patients moved in and out since yesterday. Each card in the digest links directly to the pre-filtered Patient Tracking view so you can take action immediately.

updates.title: Activity Hover on Journey Cards
updates.body: Hovering over any journey board card now shows a live snapshot of patient movement — entered, exited, and net change since yesterday — without leaving the page.

updates.title: Issue Group Assigned Date Column
updates.body: Patient Tracking now includes an "Assigned to Card" date column — sortable and filterable by date range — so you can see exactly when each patient entered a card and narrow your list to a specific window.

updates.title: Consent Status & HCO Columns in Patient Tracking
updates.body: Consent Status and HCO columns and filters are now available in Patient Tracking.

updates.title: Status Detail Column Default Visibility
updates.body: The Status Detail column now defaults to visible in the Patient Profile > Status History view.

updates.title: Share Modal Warning
updates.body: A warning is now shown when a saved filter includes the Watch filter, helping prevent unintended sharing behavior.

updates.title: Sortable Latest Referral Date Column
updates.body: The "Latest Referral Date" column in Patient Tracking is now sortable when a payer filter is active.

updates.title: Days Pending Column Accuracy
updates.body: The Days Pending column now shows correct values for patients in Pending status.
